urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar

urdu transliteration text: Lori armaano se bharpur sunalu mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me tell you a lullaby full of my wishes (for you), come my Asghar
